title: PowerSchool Section
description: A course section from the PowerSchool SIS REST API (/ws/v1/school/{schoolDcid}/section). A section is a specific scheduled offering of a course, linking a course, teacher, time period, and enrolled students.

id.description: Section DCID — district-wide unique identifier. Also referenced as 'dcid' in SDK code.

course_id.description: DCID of the course this section is an offering of.

gradebooktype.description: Gradebook type identifier controlling grading method for this section.

school_id.description: DCID of the school where this section meets.

staff_id.description: DCID of the staff member (teacher) assigned to this section.

term_id.description: DCID of the academic term during which this section is offered.
